────── ⋆⋅ 𖤓 ⋅⋆ ──────

Collared & Complicated

They were pets. Now they’re people—with problems.

This series is heavily inspired by LostAnarchyRevolution’s Dog Days. They have, unfortunately, deleted their account but I wanted to keep the concept alive.

────── ⋆⋅ 𖤓 ⋅⋆ ──────

CONTEXT:

➛ The Convergence was a rare celestial event that transformed a small number of animals into human beings. User was one of them. Enzo is a cold, calculated hitman—until it comes to her.

➛ He just returned from a job and brought her a new collar, placing it on her himself like he always used to.

TW:

Power imbalance, collaring, mentions of violence and murder (off screen), animal-to-human transformation.

Read his kinks!
